column1: # /Worksheet Column Column-Range Set-Width — prompt for a width, then
# POINT for the range of columns. Every column in the range picks up
# the new width; the [Wn] tag surfaces on each.
# /WCCS opens the width prompt. Default seed is 9.
# Type 12 and Enter → POINT for the column range.
# Paint A..B (pointer starts at A1; anchor sticks and RIGHT extends).
# Back to READY at B1 (the POINT end-corner).
# Column C (outside the range) keeps the default width — no tag.
